metal_doe_directional.notes: Directional diagnostics lane with Apple UMA shortcut-friendly uploads enabled

metal_doe_comparable.notes: Strict comparable lane: staged upload-copy path required to match Dawn delegate upload work

metal_doe_release.notes: Strict release lane: staged upload-copy path required to match Dawn delegate upload work

metal_webkit_release.notes: Metal WebKit WebGPU baseline benchmark lane via struct-translating shim

metal_webkit_comparable.notes: Strict comparable WebKit lane: staged upload-copy path required to match Doe comparable upload work

vulkan_doe_app.notes: AMD Vulkan app lane after controlled cutover

vulkan_doe_comparable.notes: Strict comparable Vulkan lane: staged copy for device-local dst, direct memcpy for host-visible dst (matches Dawn WriteBuffer behavior)

vulkan_doe_release.notes: Strict AMD Vulkan extended release lane: staged copy for device-local dst, direct memcpy for host-visible dst (matches Dawn WriteBuffer behavior)

vulkan_dawn_release.notes: Vulkan Dawn baseline benchmark lane retained after app cutover

d3d12_doe_comparable.notes: Strict comparable D3D12 lane (compute/upload/pipeline/p0-resource subset only, staged-copy uploads required)

d3d12_doe_release.notes: Strict D3D12 release lane (compute/upload/pipeline/p0-resource subset only, staged-copy uploads required)
